strongest_evidence_topics.topic: Codex lowers data review and judgment cost
Codex lowers material review and execution cost
Codex supports a multi-project personal workflow
Codex cannot replace human judgment or prove business success

best_script_candidates.candidate: Codex did not directly make me money, but it made fewer things require me staring at them manually.
One person can keep several projects moving when Codex turns messy work into checklists, reports, and next actions.
The most important gain is not automatic money, but lower execution cost, lower review cost, and clearer boundaries.

missing_or_weak_evidence: No visible PDF/PPT/boss-ready exported report; only Markdown/ChatGPT-style report materials are visible.

privacy_or_secret_risks: No visible API key/token/secret found in inspected frames.

platform_risks: Do not present early platform screenshots as final performance proof.
Do not imply automated publishing, one-click money, or fully unattended operation.
Review M05 public-space footage for privacy/portrait risk before publication.
